name: araxys
summary: Plug & play security for FastAPI — CORS (glob), CSRF, IP blocking (trusted proxies), rate limiting (fixed+sliding), honeypots (URL+passive), JWT (RS256/ES256, token binding, leeway), API keys (sk_/pk_), MFA (TOTP), OAuth2/OIDC (PKCE), RBAC (resource:action), brute force (TTL), sessions, OTEL, Prometheus, encrypted audit (hash-chain), CSP, sanitization (JSON+form+multipart), prompt injection detection, DB security (Redis+PG pool, TLS, secrets), SQL parser
author: Samuel Esteban Urrego Valencia
